title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF SAN ROQUE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MARABUT, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4297 / 53 OG No. 15, 4778 (August 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1655, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF SAN ROQUE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MARABUT, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Cabugao in the Municipality of Marabut, Province of Samar, is hereby constituted into a barrio of the said municipality to be known as the barrio of San Roque.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
